_comment: Example project bundle for a secret-backed server. /mcp-secure:add merges this into a repo's .mcp.json. mcp-launch resolves EXAMPLE_TOKEN from your backend at spawn (never a literal). Uses the bare 'mcp-launch' command because a repo .mcp.json has no ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}; mcp-secure puts mcp-launch on PATH. Copy this and replace example-mcp-server with the real one.
